_doc: Scoped permission sandbox for the unattended curator/autopilot daemon (B-014). Passed to the headless run via --settings. Replaces --dangerously-skip-permissions: the daemon can edit framework files + use git, but is HARD-DENIED from editing source code, reaching the network, pushing, or running destructive shell. deny rules take precedence over allow + the acceptEdits mode, so source edits are blocked even though framework edits auto-accept.
